series_metadata.series_description: All records concerning federal grants to state agencies which document the expenditure of federal monies. Can include, but may not be limited to, grant applications and supporting documentation, financial reports and monitoring reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 3 biennia current year (total ) and audited by State Auditor, audit report released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved. ; Electronic: 3 biennia current year (total ) and audited by State Auditor, audit report released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved
